stemHtml: What should a pilot do if the aircraft is subject to unlawful interference and contact with ATS cannot be established?

options.a: Attempt to broadcast warnings on the current frequency or on an emergency frequency.
options.b: Once on the new track, alter heading by 5° every 5 minutes.
options.c: Change the transponder code to the current code plus 5.
options.d: Fly at the corresponding IFR flight level plus or minus 200 ft.
